name: japanese-learning-app
description: A comprehensive Japanese learning app similar to Duolingo with web and mobile support

scripts.dev: concurrently "PORT=5001 npm --workspace backend run dev" "PORT=3001 npm --workspace web run start" "npm --workspace mobile run start"
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace mobile run build
scripts.test: concurrently "npm --workspace backend run test" "npm --workspace web run test" "npm --workspace mobile run test"
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules web/node_modules mobile/node_modules shared/node_modules
